name: Mohammed Ibrahim

education.degree: Master of Science in Data Analytic Engineering
education.coursework: Data Management for Analytics, Data Mining, Data Warehousing, Storytelling with Data

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
education.coursework: Management Science, Financial Analysis, Web Services and Cloud Computing, Web Engineering

summary: Data Engineer and AI/ML practitioner with 3+ years of experience building production data pipelines, LLM-powered applications, and full-stack platforms. Architected financial analytics ETL systems on AWS processing 2M+ records, built RAG retrieval pipelines using Gemini 2.5 Flash and OpenAI, and delivered end-to-end ML platforms from training to GCP deployment. Pursuing MS in Data Analytic Engineering at Northeastern University (GPA 3.8/4.0).

experience.title: Data Engineer
bullets: Architected end-to-end financial analytics data platform on AWS, designing a  PostgreSQL schema on RDS that ingests, deduplicates, and serves 2M+ investor-grade records with 24/7 availability

Built Airflow-orchestrated ETL pipelines collecting financial data from 3 vendor APIs, applying LLM transformations (Gemini 2.5 Flash) to extract structured analytics, cutting manual processing from 4 hours to under 1 hour
Designed SCD Type 2 deduplication logic across PostgreSQL tables, preventing record corruption and enforcing historical data lineage across 2M+ financial data points
Engineered a standalone Node.js microservice with node-cron scheduling to automate API polling across 3 financial data sources, eliminating manual ingestion and guaranteeing daily collection coverage
Built an OpenAI embedding pipeline over the financial analytics corpus and implemented a RAG retrieval layer, enabling semantic search across financial disclosures for investor analytics queries
Designed a model-agnostic LLM orchestration layer supporting hot-swap between Gemini 2.5 Flash, OpenAI GPT-4, and DeepSeek, enabling cost-based routing and eliminating vendor lock-in
Implemented ELK stack monitoring dashboards tracking ingestion pipeline health across 2M+ records, enabling the internal ops team to detect and resolve data failures proactively
Optimized PostgreSQL query performance through composite indexing and query restructuring on a , 2M-record schema, reducing analyst report generation latency by 60%
Provisioned and maintained AWS EC2 production infrastructure for pipeline deployment, configuring auto-restart policies and environment management for 24/7 financial data availability
Eliminated recurring vendor API costs by building a self-sufficient analytical store through LLM-based extraction and intelligent caching of raw financial filings

experience.title: Inventory Analyst
bullets: Maintained and optimized Excel-based device inventory tracking system for 500+ units across multiple store locations, reducing collection processing time by 50% and producing weekly management reports

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern
bullets: Cleaned and prepared 200K+ customer records by fixing missing values, resolving data-type issues, and standardizing fields in Pandas, ensuring high-quality inputs for downstream analysis
Developed key performance metrics including consumption trends, net margin performance, and customer lifetime value to identify profitability drivers and high-risk customer segments
Visualized churn trends using matplotlib and seaborn, surfacing that customers with low net margins and declining consumption were 2x more likely to churn
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to translate data findings into actionable insights, recommending margin-based pricing adjustments that improved prediction precision by 15%

projects.name: PyroWatch - Wildfire Detection and Response Platform
bullets: Architected a 21-task Airflow DAG ingesting and fusing 5 geospatial data feeds (NASA FIRMS, Open-Meteo, NWS, HRRR, GOES) across two regions, processing 50GB+ of geospatial data and lifting downstream model freshness by 40%
Trained dual XGBoost ignition-prediction models per region with AUC-PR deployment gates of >= 0.89 and >= 0.78 , with auto-archival and zero manual promotion via Vertex AI model registry

Designed a FastAPI inference service on Cloud Run chaining XGBoost prediction, Monte Carlo fire-spread simulation, and Gemini RAG report generation in a single endpoint, serving requests at sub-2s p95 latency
Built a React + Tailwind operator dashboard exposing ignition risk maps, fire-spread simulations, and incident reports across CA/TX, cutting analyst time-to-insight from hours to under 2 minutes
Engineered a Fairlearn-based bias gate enforcing FNR disparity <= 0.15 across region/season/fuel slices, blocking 3 unfair candidate models from production despite passing headline AUC metrics

Built a drift-detection service combining PSI (>0.2), Jensen-Shannon divergence, and SHAP feature-importance shift, auto-triggering retrains via GitHub Actions and cutting drift response from days to 6 hours
Implemented DVC-versioned feature parquets backed by GCS, enabling fully reproducible model training and reducing dataset-debug cycles from days to under an hour
Engineered five GitHub Actions workflows automating build, test, train, and deploy across Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, GCE, and Vertex AI, cutting release cycle from manual hours to ~10 minutes
Provisioned GCP infrastructure including an 8-role CI/CD-deployer service account, GCS artifact bucket, Cloud Scheduler crons, and a Compute Engine VM running Airflow via Docker Compose
Implemented a Gemini 2.5 Flash RAG disaster reporter over a curated fuel-type corpus, generating structured incident briefs that replaced 90% of manually authored response templates
Engineered a two-tier weather data fallback  eliminating 429 rate-limit failures and cutting ingestion downtime by 90%
Analyzed 15+ geospatial wildfire feeds using Python and SHAP to surface soil moisture as the dominant ignition signal, informing a decision-threshold tune that lifted PR-AUC by 9%

projects.name: Opportunity.AI - AI-Powered Job Matching and Resume Tailoring Platform
bullets: Designed and built a full-stack AI job-matching platform with a Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui frontend and FastAPI backend, reducing job-search time from hours to minutes through semantic search and AI-generated match explanations
Engineered multi-source job scraping pipelines for 8+ boards  with Airflow DAG orchestration
Implemented Vertex AI embedding pipeline with pgvector HNSW index, enabling sub-100ms semantic similarity search across thousands of live job listings using a hybrid scoring engine

Designed a Gemini-powered resume tailoring pipeline that mirrors JD exact terminology and auto-generates ATS-optimized PDF and plain-text resumes targeting Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, and iCIMS parsers
Built  API accepting PDF and DOCX files, extracting skills and experience via LLM, then ranking 250+ candidate jobs through semantic and skill-overlap hybrid scoring
Architected a GCS-backed storage layer for job descriptions, embedding artifacts, and tailored resume files, decoupling storage from compute and enabling horizontal scaling
Implemented RAG-based career Q&A and job explanation endpoints powered by Gemini, grounding responses in the live job database to deliver role-specific insights and match reasoning
